reviews.review_title: Horrible Game. Do better next time.
reviews.review_description:
This game is so bad, half of the things are stolen from other games. And the jumpscare didn't even scare me, and the things from it made me laugh, the moderator tried to scare me by putting his moderator hat or whatever, soooo scary, definitely dude, maybe next time don't steal stuff from other creators.

Yours truly - tomaschingon 2025

developer_response.body: first of all, this is my first ever fangame so obviously its not gonna be great. second of all, i got permission from the developer and owner of fun monke horror to use these assets.

reviews.review_title: Don’t put bad ratings cause he copied
reviews.review_description: Guys he got permission to use stuff from fun monkey horror and etc second this is his first gtag fan game so don’t  think it’s gonna be like super good (not saying it’s bad it’s good) third don’t expect the jumpscares to be scary for his first fan game so he’s just getting into the basics (not saying the jumpscares are bad)
Almost everything here is unorginal, i wouldnt be surprised if he just searched up how to make a gorilla tag fan game. Stolen from games like Fun monke horror, and plenty of things from sketchfab

developer_response.body: first of all, this is my first ever fangame so obviously im gonna watch tutorials. second of all, i got permission from the developer and owner of fun monke horror to use these assets.

reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun and I really love it I haven’t played any other game for days hyper is a great dev because he made this game and yeah that’s all I gotta say
Hyper makes the best fan games better than real fun monke horror get the game so you can have fun with friends and chill with granny
A owner saw me the owners is super nice my name the game is piohg
I broke up with my wife to play this
I helped make this game and know hyper. He is a pretty good dev and I hope to see more people join, and enjoy this fangame
fun and unique game, lots of maps
Just peak man's what do you want me to say?￼
